center.name: Alphonse Dubois
center.summary: Alphonse Dubois是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Brown lory，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown lory (Chalcopsitta duivenbodei), also called Duyvenbode's lory, is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae native to northern New Guinea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The brown lory (Chalcopsitta duivenbodei), also called Duyvenbode's lory, is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae native to northern New Guinea
